# Transcrição: 18. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - VERY FEW PEOPLE THINK THEY CAN

- **Fonte:** 18. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - VERY FEW PEOPLE THINK THEY CAN
- **Duração:** 00:13
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:13]

You just heard, I don't think I can afford to do this. Look, very few people think they can afford to do anything until they look at the monthly outlay. Allow me to make it a reality for you so you can do what you want. Let me show you how to make sense of this.
